title: I'm So Excited
why_this_song: I'm So Excited by The Pointer Sisters (1982) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 15 times; first heard in: "And I know, I know, I know, I know, I know I want you"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "I want to love you, feel you"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "I just can't get enough"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "I'm so excited, and I just can't hide it"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "I'm so excited, and I just can't hide it"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I want to squeeze you, please you
And if you move real slow, I'll let it go
I'm so excited, and I just can't hide it
Tonight's the night we're gonna make it happen
Tonight we'll put all other things aside
Give in this time and show me some affection

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "know" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "know" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "want" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Tonight's the night we're gonna make it happen
I want to squeeze you, please you

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "I'm So Excited" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "I'm So Excited"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask The Pointer Sisters one question about "I'm So Excited", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para The Pointer Sisters sobre "I'm So Excited", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "I'm So Excited" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "I'm So Excited" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
